goal: Build a parallel-picking duo: 2 Frankas share a single conveyor pickup zone, coordinated via setup_robot_claim_mutex. Both robots pick from same belt to same bin; mutex prevents simultaneous picks. Realizes research scenario #10 'Parallel Picking Duo (Zone Belt)'.
thoughts:
Six parallel-pick specifics for CP-52 (extends CP-07's multi-robot scoping):
1) 2 Frankas at x=±0.5 (close enough that both reach same conveyor pickup zone).
2) Single conveyor at y=0.4 between them. Cubes flow from -X to +X.
3) Mutex marker /World/PickMutex protects the pickup zone /World/PickZone (a virtual prim at conveyor center).
4) Both robots' source_paths includes ALL cubes. Both have own controller install. Without mutex enforcement (Sprint 3+ work), they may race; mutex prim is canonical scaffolding.
5) Both drop to /World/SharedBin at y=-0.4. Bin within both robots' reach.
6) Industrial pattern: increase throughput via 2 robots on same belt — scenario #10.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/FrankaA",
    position=[-0.5, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/FrankaB",
    position=[ 0.5, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Shared bin behind both robots
create_bin(prim_path="/World/SharedBin", position=[0, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

# Mutex protecting the pickup zone (virtual — both robots authorized)
setup_robot_claim_mutex(
    mutex_path="/World/PickMutex",
    resource_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    robots=["/World/FrankaA", "/World/FrankaB"],
)

# Per-robot sensors at OFFSET pick zones (A picks earlier, B picks later)
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/SensorA", position=[-0.2, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/SensorB", position=[ 0.2, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Robot A picks first half + drops. Robot B picks second half + drops.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaA",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/SensorA",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2"],
    destination_path="/World/SharedBin",
    drop_target=[0, -0.5, 0.85],
    mutex_path="/World/PickMutex",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt"],
)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaB",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/SensorB",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_3", "/World/Cube_4"],
    destination_path="/World/SharedBin",
    drop_target=[0, -0.5, 0.85],
    mutex_path="/World/PickMutex",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt"],
)
extension_notes: CP-52 demonstrates parallel-picking duo via source_paths split (A handles Cube_1-2, B handles Cube_3-4). Mutex prim defines shared resource scaffolding; runtime coordination via mutex attrs is Sprint 3+ work. Realizes scenario #10.
failure_modes: Cubes 3-4 belt-flow past sensor A first → A may grab them out of source_paths scope. Mitigated: A's source_paths=[Cube_1, Cube_2] — controller's _next_cube only considers its own list.
Both robots try to use same cuRobo planner — _curobo_pp_sub_<TAG> scoping handles this (CP-07 verified pattern).
Sensor B at x=+0.2 — cubes belt-flow past A's sensor at -0.2 first. B picks AFTER A.
